title: Hides, Skins and Leather Trade (Inspectors) Notice, 2023
title_en: Hides, Skins and Leather Trade (Inspectors) Notice, 2023

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: This Notice shall be cited as the Hides, Skins and Leather Trade (Inspectors) Notice, 2023.

provisions.title: Notice of appointment
provisions.content: Notice is hereby given that the registered veterinarians, livestock officers or livestock field officers specified in the Schedule to this Notice are hereby appointed to be Inspectors for the purpose of the Hides, Skins and Leather Trade Act. [ Cap. 120 ]

provisions.title: Tenure
provisions.content: A registered veterinarian, livestock officer or livestock field officer under this Notice shall, unless he dies, retire or resigns from public service, hold office for a period as determined by the appointing authority.
